known_gaps: Vendor-specific archive quirks still require manual triage
Live-environment protocol variability can degrade reliability
No guarantee of complete archive route discovery for proprietary stacks
entries.false_safety_risk: Medium: normalized archive output can look complete while target-specific routes remain undiscovered

known_gaps: Complex multi-step auth flows may be underrepresented
Some auth verdicts depend on fallback paths
Credential hygiene still relies on sampled scenarios
entries.false_safety_risk: High: secure-looking flags may mask untested auth boundary conditions

known_gaps: Fingerprint hints are probabilistic and can be noisy
Coverage depends on crawl visibility and endpoint exposure
Not a full asset inventory guarantee
entries.false_safety_risk: High: strong-looking hints can be mistaken for definitive product identification

entries.capability: explainable grouping and known-good/known-bad baseline validation for spider outputs
known_gaps: Evidence quality bounded by upstream surface signal
Inconclusive outcomes increase under sparse data
No active validation of hidden paths in this layer
entries.false_safety_risk: Medium: structured reports can be over-trusted when source signal is weak

known_gaps: Transient network conditions can cause misses
Service identity still depends on limited banners/hints
entries.false_safety_risk: Medium: closed/quiet scan windows can be mistaken for hardened posture

entries.capability: risk-oriented audit over normalized port scan
known_gaps: Risk scoring is rule-based and may miss environment context
Expected-port assumptions can be stale
entries.false_safety_risk: High: low risk score may hide non-port attack surface

entries.capability: passive traffic observation and correlation with surface
known_gaps: Observation quality depends on traffic volume in capture window
Sparse traffic frequently yields inconclusive outputs
Passive view cannot prove absence of risky behavior
entries.false_safety_risk: High: quiet windows can be misread as safe behavior

known_gaps: Scenario pack is finite and not exhaustive
Complex real-world session transitions may be unmodeled
entries.false_safety_risk: Medium: passing baseline cases does not guarantee robust lifecycle security

weakest_contours: surface/spider fingerprint confidence under sparse discovery
top_false_safety_zones: Auth/session appears secure under fallback-limited evidence
Fingerprint hints treated as definitive attribution
Quiet passive window interpreted as absence of risk
next_priorities: Tighter confidence calibration for sparse-signal contours
